articles.title: Why did Starmer resign and what could happen next?
articles.description: The Labour leader says he will remain prime minister until his successor is chosen.

articles.title: Watch and read Starmer's resignation speech in full
articles.description: Sir Keir announces he will be step down as Labour leader and PM in a Downing Street address.

articles.title: Top lawyer whose 'Mr Rules' approach failed to connect with the public
articles.description: Less than two years after he won a huge majority in the 2024 general election, Sir Keir Starmer has been forced out.

articles.title: Who is Andy Burnham? Ex-Manchester mayor who wants to lead the country
articles.description: The outgoing Greater Manchester mayor is lining up a third attempt to be Labour leader following his return to Westminster.
